title: LedgerMetadata
description: Metadata for a single BookKeeper ledger.

fields.name: ensembleSize
fields.description: Number of bookies in the ensemble.

fields.name: writeQuorumSize
fields.description: Number of bookies to write to per entry.

fields.name: ackQuorumSize
fields.description: Number of acks required before an entry is considered written.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State of the ledger (OPEN or CLOSED).

fields.name: length
fields.description: Total byte length of the ledger.

fields.name: lastEntryId
fields.description: ID of the last entry in the ledger.
